item.description:
# N1KO-STATE v1.0.15
**Dashboard ring redesign** — all gauge details move inside the ring with spring animations, glow, and premium card styling.
**仪表盘圆环重设计** — 详情全部移入圆环中心，配合弹簧动效、光晕与精致卡片样式。
---
## Download / 下载
| Asset | Description | |-------|-------------| | **N1KO-STATE.dmg** | Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Drag to Applications. | | **N1KO-STATE-sparkle.zip** | In-app updater archive used by Sparkle. Normal manual installs should use the DMG. | | **appcast.xml** | Sparkle update feed for automatic update checks. |
**Install note:** If macOS blocks the ad-hoc signed app on first launch, run `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app` in Terminal. You can also right-click **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **Open** on first launch.
**安装说明：** 如果首次打开被 macOS 拦截，优先在「终端」执行 `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app`。也可以右键 **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **打开**（仅首次需要）。
---
## What's New / 本版本内容
### Gauges Popover / 仪表盘弹窗
- Primary value and all detail rows (Load, Cores, Uptime, VRAM, etc.) now live inside the ring center. - Spring-animated gradient arc with a soft pulsing glow. - Staggered card entrance animation and module-tinted card surfaces.
- 主数值与全部详情行（负载、核心数、运行时间、显存等）移入圆环中心。 - 渐变弧线 + 弹簧动画 + 柔和呼吸光晕。 - 卡片依次入场，模块色渐变底与描边。
### Versioning / 版本同步
- Updated app version metadata to `1.0.15` / build `115`.
- 应用版本元数据更新为 `1.0.15` / build `115`。
---
## Full changelog / 完整变更
**Full changelog:** [v1.0.15 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.15)
